tools.name: Color Block
tools.description: Colour blocks — text, image, logo — auto-arranged into a grid.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M10 22V7a1 1 0 0 0-1-1H4a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v12a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2v-5a1 1 0 0 0-1-1H2" /><rect x="14" y="2" width="8" height="8" rx="1" /></svg>

featured.blurb: Colour blocks — text, image, logo in a grid

blocks.text: From edge to core, one open platform.
Confidential computing from edge to cloud.
Three days of open source, cloud native and AI.
Full-lifecycle protection for cloud native workloads.

tools.name: Dynamic Layout
tools.description: A do-anything layout that recomposes around whatever you add, at any size.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect width="18" height="18" x="3" y="3" rx="2" /><path d="M3 9h18" /><path d="M9 21V9" /></svg>

values.heading: Build on your terms
values.subheading: The open source platform for the enterprise
values.body:
From cloud to edge — one platform.

> Kubernetes at any scale
> Linux you can trust

values.heading: SUSECON 2026
values.body: Drei Tage Keynotes, praktische Workshops und Open-Source-Community.

values.heading: Từ biên đến lõi
values.subheading: Chạy ở mọi nơi, quản lý mọi chốn

values.heading: Confianza cero, cero dramas
values.subheading: Seguridad de contenedores que no se queda atrás
values.body: Protección de ciclo completo para cargas cloud native.

values.heading: Ouvert. Adaptable. À vous.
values.subheading: Un logiciel indépendant pour un monde dépendant

tools.name: Quote Card
tools.description: On-brand quote cards for social posts and slides.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M16 3a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v6a2 2 0 0 0 2 2 1 1 0 0 1 1 1v1a2 2 0 0 1-2 2 1 1 0 0 0-1 1v2a1 1 0 0 0 1 1 6 6 0 0 0 6-6V5a2 2 0 0 0-2-2z" /><path d="M5 3a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v6a2 2 0 0 0 2 2 1 1 0 0 1 1 1v1a2 2 0 0 1-2 2 1 1 0 0 0-1 1v2a1 1 0 0 0 1 1 6 6 0 0 0 6-6V5a2 2 0 0 0-2-2z" /></svg>

values.quote: The best infrastructure is the kind you never have to think about.
values.name: Amina Okafor

values.quote: Kubernetes gave us a common language. **Rancher** made it speak at scale.
values.name: Diego Fernández

values.quote: We build in the open because the best ideas come from everywhere.
values.name: Mei Chen

values.quote: AI at the edge isn't a feature. It's where the real world meets compute.
values.name: Ravi Patel

tools.name: Meeting Planner
tools.description: Plan a global meeting and see the time for every teammate's timezone.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10" /><path d="M12 2a14.5 14.5 0 0 0 0 20 14.5 14.5 0 0 0 0-20" /><path d="M2 12h20" /></svg>

tools.name: Code Canvas
tools.description: Turn code snippets into clean, syntax-highlighted, shareable images.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="m7 11 2-2-2-2" /><path d="M11 13h4" /><rect width="18" height="18" x="3" y="3" rx="2" ry="2" /></svg>

values.code:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail

for host in web db cache; do
  echo "Deploying to $host…"
  ssh "$host" 'systemctl restart lolly'
done

scenes.body: One platform for every cloud, edge and datacenter.
Deploy Kubernetes anywhere with SUSE Rancher.
SUSE Linux Enterprise runs everywhere your business does.
Run trusted AI workloads on an open source foundation.
Container security from build to runtime.

tools.name: Calendar ICS
tools.description: Turn event details into a calendar (.ics) file for any calendar app.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M8 2v4" /><path d="M16 2v4" /><rect width="18" height="18" x="3" y="4" rx="2" /><path d="M3 10h18" /></svg>

values.description: Opening keynote: the open source enterprise.
Hands-on lab: deploy and manage clusters with Rancher Prime.
Ship something you love. Prizes at 5pm.

tools.name: Compress PDF
tools.description: Shrink a PDF by recompressing its images — on your device.

values.coverSubtitle: A summer of building in the open
From the datacenter to the far edge

boxes.text: “Open source is how the world builds what comes next.”
One secure platform from edge to core.
Generally available today across every major cloud.

tools.description: Build animated ads from layered scenes, each carrying a Lottie motion asset, for any standard size.

scenes.caption: One platform for every cloud, edge and datacenter.
Deploy Kubernetes anywhere with SUSE Rancher.
Trusted AI on an open source foundation.
Container security from build to runtime.

tools.name: Pose Geeko
tools.description: Pose the SUSE Geeko with sliders — eyes, blink and limbs. No animation, just a still you can dial in and export print-ready.

tools.description: Record a voice note with a live level meter and gentle coaching, then save it as MP3.

tools.description: Record a clip in any orientation, then auto-wrap it with branded intro and outro bookends, a lower-third, and a music bed.

tools.name: Asset Export
tools.description: Render any catalog asset — or a Lolly tool link — out to any format and size.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="3" y="3" width="18" height="14" rx="2"/><circle cx="8.5" cy="8.5" r="1.5"/><path d="m21 15-5-5L5 21"/><path d="M12 21v-6"/><path d="m9 18 3 3 3-3"/></svg>

tools.name: Doc Studio
tools.description: Write a multi-page document on the canvas — rich text, headings, tables and inserted Lolly renders that flow onto pages and export as a PDF.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M15 2H6a2 2 0 0 0-2 2v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h12a2 2 0 0 0 2-2V7z"/><path d="M14 2v5h5"/><line x1="8" y1="12" x2="16" y2="12"/><line x1="8" y1="16" x2="14" y2="16"/></svg>

tools.name: Carousel Maker
tools.description: Design a multi-page carousel on one canvas — set 1–6 same-size pages, drop objects onto each page, export an image sequence or a multi-page PDF.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="8" y="4" width="8" height="16" rx="2" /><path d="M4.5 7v10" /><path d="M19.5 7v10" /></svg>

tools.name: Flow Chart
tools.description: Build flow charts on an open canvas — drag cards, connect them, and the lines route and stick to the boxes.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="9" y="2" width="6" height="6" rx="1"/><rect x="2" y="16" width="6" height="6" rx="1"/><rect x="16" y="16" width="6" height="6" rx="1"/><path d="M12 8v4"/><path d="M5 16v-2a1 1 0 0 1 1-1h12a1 1 0 0 1 1 1v2"/></svg>

featured.blurb: Cards + connectors that stick to the boxes

tools.name: D3 Chart Studio
tools.description: Powerful data-driven charts with D3 — paste a table and it charts itself. Bars, lines, areas, scatter, pie, radar, treemap, heatmap and more, on-brand and vector-clean.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 3v16a2 2 0 0 0 2 2h16" /><path d="M7 15c2.5 0 3-6 5-6s2.5 4 4.5 4 2.5-5 4.5-5" /><circle cx="7" cy="15" r="1.1" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" /><circle cx="12" cy="9" r="1.1" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" /><circle cx="16.5" cy="13" r="1.1" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" /></svg>

featured.blurb: Paste a table — D3 charts it, on-brand and vector-clean

tools.name: Record
tools.description: Design your own top and tail cards, then record a clip and Lolly wraps them around it automatically.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><rect x="2" y="6" width="20" height="12" rx="2"/><path d="M8 6v12"/><path d="M16 6v12"/><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="2.4" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/></svg>

tools.name: 3D
tools.description: Load a 3D model into a lit scene, orbit and pose the camera, and render a still or a turntable animation.
tools.icon: <svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="24" height="24" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M21 8a2 2 0 0 0-1-1.73l-7-4a2 2 0 0 0-2 0l-7 4A2 2 0 0 0 3 8v8a2 2 0 0 0 1 1.73l7 4a2 2 0 0 0 2 0l7-4A2 2 0 0 0 21 16Z"/><path d="m3.3 7 8.7 5 8.7-5"/><path d="M12 22V12"/></svg>
